title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
posterAlt: Hum Saath Saath Hain (1999) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A wealthy businessman's traditional family celebrate their togetherness when his three sons get married, but slowly find themselves growing apart after a misunderstanding.
synopsis: Hum Saath Saath Hain is a 1999 romance, family and drama film from India. It carries a 6.3 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 6 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
